alt: A juvenile banded archerfish practicing its hunting posture near the surface
caption: Juvenile archerfish begin practicing their shooting technique when they are just a few centimeters long, learning from the success of older fish.
acquisitionNotes: High-resolution photograph of developing juvenile archerfish. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/d1/Toxotes_jaculatrix_%28banded_archerfish%29_1_%2815534079567%29.jpg
